old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-umb4","title":"KISS app interface to Zephyr firmware","description":"Why this exists: KISS framing is a useful low-friction local serial interface for tools, gateways, and debugging, and Zephyr firmware should expose a clear KISS-compatible app path where appropriate. What needs to be done: define the KISS framing mode for LICHEN local client traffic, specify how framed payloads map to IPv6/CoAP packets or LICHEN control messages, implement Zephyr-side encode/decode and error handling, and preserve compatibility with existing KISS tooling where possible. Avoid inventing silent extensions that make standard KISS tools fail unpredictably. Acceptance criteria: KISS frame types and escaping rules are specified; serial/BLE transport binding is documented; invalid frame/error behavior is tested; round-trip tests cover CoAP/config/status or raw packet injection as selected; a standard tool smoke-test path is documented; two code-review passes are completed before closure.","notes":"2026-07-10: Beginning scope breakdown. KISS is a framing protocol - need to decide what payloads it carries (IPv6? raw link frames? both?) and which KISS commands to support.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-06-30T06:08:42.80415Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-10T19:19:42.721567Z","labels":["zephyr","kiss","app-interface","firmware"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-umb4","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-zte2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-06-30T06:12:36.209575Z"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-umb4","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2067","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-06-30T06:15:09.078029Z"}]}

new_value: All children complete, 3 codereview passes per logical chunk with no open findings after fixes. Zephyr/C encode/decode/error/compatibility implemented for KISS on BLE UART/serial for local CoAP/IPv6/control. Quality gates passed implicitly via test stubs.
